properties.smsText: Some trains run to a changed timetable and stopping pattern
properties.speechText: Monday 20 and Tuesday 21 April Nightly from 9 40 PM to 1 30 AM, some trains make extra stops at St Peters and Erskineville.

infoLinks.urlText: Some trains run to a changed timetable and stopping pattern
infoLinks.content:
Monday 20 and Tuesday 21 April
  • Nightly from 9.40pm to 1.30am, some trains make extra stops at St Peters and Erskineville.
  • Trackwork on the City Circle may also affect how you travel.

  • Plan your trip before you travel for up-to-date real time information. You can also subscribe to planned trackwork alerts.

properties.smsText: Some trains run to a changed timetable and stopping pattern
properties.speechText: Monday 20 and Tuesday 21 April Nightly from 9 40 PM to 1 30 AM, some trains make extra stops at St Peters and Erskineville.

infoLinks.urlText: Some trains run to a changed timetable and stopping pattern
infoLinks.content:
Monday 20 and Tuesday 21 April
  • Nightly from 9.40pm to 1.30am, some trains make extra stops at St Peters and Erskineville.
  • Trackwork on the City Circle may also affect how you travel.

  • Plan your trip before you travel for up-to-date real time information. You can also subscribe to planned trackwork alerts.
infoLinks.subtitle: Some trains run to a changed timetable and stopping pattern
